<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band13_chunk008.pdf#page=25 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band13 p398 -->

<!-- header: REBDORF -->

<!-- header: REBDORE -->


[[File:Band13_chunk008_p025_img001.jpg|thumb|Mittelschiffgewölbe mit den Fresken G bis I]]



[[File:Band13_chunk008_p025_img002.jpg|thumb]]


398
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band13 p399 -->
